name: Ownership Dashboard
description: Authenticated investor workspace for managing fractional holdings. Shows portfolio KPIs, cap tables per asset, and distribution history with performance charts.

page_briefs.portfolio: Investor-only holdings dashboard. Dashboard KPI grid across the top shows total portfolio value, 30-day change, total yield, and distribution YTD. Standard data table lists each position with asset name, shares, cost basis, current value, and P/L. Chart grid underneath plots performance and allocation.
page_briefs.cap-table: Per-asset ownership breakdown. Standard cap table shows full holder list with share counts and ownership percentages. Pie summary chart visualizes concentration among top holders versus float.
page_briefs.distributions: Dividend history page. Standard ledger lists every distribution received across all assets with date, asset, per-share amount, and total paid. Chart grid visualizes distribution trends over time by asset.

shells.sidebar-main: Authenticated app shell with sidebar navigation and main content area
